title: MessageContent text-extraction pattern duplicated 7 times across providers
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Dimension: Performance & Complexity / SRP

Location: src/providers/anthropic.rs convert_messages (lines 37-79), google.rs convert_messages (lines 22-59), ollama.rs convert_messages (lines 24-43), plus proxy.rs extract_extensions_from_messages (lines 415-439).

Violation: Four functions walk the same messages Vec doing essentially the same transform: for each message, switch on MessageContent enum, collect either Text or join Parts' text fields. The join-Parts-text pattern in particular is copy-pasted verbatim at:
  - anthropic.rs line 27-33 (extract_system)
  - anthropic.rs line 49-70 (convert_messages)
  - google.rs line 32-50 (convert_messages)
  - google.rs line 82-89 (extract_system)
  - ollama.rs line 28-35 (convert_messages)
  - proxy.rs line 422-429 (extract_extensions_from_messages)
  - proxy.rs line 454-461 (prepare_request_context last_user_message)
Seven duplicate copies of `match &msg.content { Text(t) => ..., Parts(p) => p.iter().filter_map(|x| x.text.clone()).collect::<Vec<_>>().join(...) }`.

The performance impact: each provider adapter re-allocates Strings when iterating messages, and each content extraction clones the text. The modularity impact: the MessageContent enum has NO methods for extracting text, forcing each consumer to reinvent the match.

Mandated Refactor:
  1. Add inherent impl methods to MessageContent (src/proxy.rs):
       impl MessageContent {
           pub fn as_text(&self) -> Cow<str> { ... }  // joins parts with \n
           pub fn text_parts(&self) -> impl Iterator<Item = &str> { ... }
       }
  2. Replace all seven duplicate sites with `m.content.as_text()` or `.text_parts()`. Each site becomes 1-3 lines.
  3. Apply Tell-Don't-Ask principle: consumers should not pattern-match on the MessageContent enum; they ask the content for its text.
  4. Keep the separator parameter (some sites use `" "`, others `"\n"`) as an explicit method argument or fork into two named methods (as_line_joined, as_space_joined) — no boolean flag parameters per QA heuristic.
